> docs\SPEC.md:864:Validators: enums constrained; thresholds range-checked; `source_languages` items must be known ISO 
codes; explicit `whisper_model`/device overrides validated against detected VRAM with a warning; changing 
`hardware_preset`/`whisper_model` mid-session takes effect at next `start`.
  docs\SPEC.md:865:
> docs\SPEC.md:881:10. **Summarizer CLI missing / unavailable:** `available()` false → graceful message naming an 
alternative provider; no `summary.md` written.
  docs\SPEC.md:882:11. **HF token missing for tier-2:** Re-diarize disabled with tooltip + link to accept model terms.
> docs\SPEC.md:901:- **Summarizer hardening:** patch `subprocess.run`; assert transcript passed **via stdin only** 
(never argv, `shell=False`), delimiters + system instruction present, isolated `cwd`, `CREATE_NO_WINDOW`, no-tools 
flags for claude/codex; prompt assembly (timestamps/labels/translation-vs-original, forced-cut stitching); chunking 
above `summary_max_chars`; graceful error on missing binary/timeout.
  docs\SPEC.md:902:- **Store round-trip & schema:** create → append N records → read back JSONL → equality; 
**`patch_utterance`** updates fields visible on read; `utterances_since(seq)` catch-up; `rename_speaker` atomic 
(temp+`os.replace`) updates records+meta+md; finalize sorts by start; partial-trailing-line tolerance; **schema-1→2 
migration** fills defaults; per-session RWLock blocks rediarize/rename during capture; crash-safe `RawSegmentWriter` 
produces valid per-minute WAV headers + concat.
> docs\SPEC.md:910:- **Server API:** FastAPI `TestClient` (with token) — settings redaction, secrets write-only, 
sessions list/open/**delete**/**delete-audio**, catch-up `since_seq`, summarize with mocked provider writes 
`summary.md`, rename, 409 on rediarize during capture. WS receives `utterance` then `patch` for the file source.
  docs\SPEC.md:911:
> docs\SPEC.md:990:- Optional `google-generativeai` (Gemini) is an extra, installed only if the user enables that 
provider. Ollama and Claude/Codex CLIs are external executables, not pip deps.
  docs\SPEC.md:991:
> docs\SPEC.md:1030:    summarizer.py                # Summarizer interface + hardened Claude/Codex/Gemini/Ollama
  docs\SPEC.md:1031:    store.py                     # SessionStore + WavWriter + RawSegmentWriter + RWLock + retention
> docs\SPEC.md:1073:- **M4 — Offline enrichment:** `diarizer.py` Tier-2 pyannote re-diarize (sample-time, HF token 
flow, disallowed during capture) + `summarizer.py` **hardened** Claude CLI default + provider selection + summary 
panel + **delete/retention** UI + expanded-UI polish (search, settings, anti-slop design pass). **Gate:** re-diarize 
relabels correctly on the sample timeline; summarizer runs stdin/no-tools/isolated-cwd; delete/retention verified.
  docs\SPEC.md:1074:
> docs\SPEC.md:1081:Most v1 open questions are now **resolved into the design** (presets §4.3, ladder §4.4, sample 
timebase §4.8, crash-safety §5.1, server-side consent/auth §5.8, hardened summarizer §5.6, keychain secrets §5.10, 
storage location §11). What remains are genuinely **hardware-dependent unknowns**, to be *validated* (not designed) by 
the benchmark harness + manual matrix (§9):
  docs\SPEC.md:1082:
> docs\SPEC.md:1087:- **Agentic-CLI residual prompt-injection (mitigated, residual documented).** The summarizer runs 
stdin-only, no-tools, isolated cwd; residual risk is at worst a misleading summary. Safest alternative (Gemini/Ollama) 
is one setting away; Claude CLI stays default per user preference (§5.6).
  docs\SPEC.md:1088:- **pywebview frameless drag/controls on Windows.** Custom chrome can be fiddly with the 
EdgeChromium backend; fallback to a thin native title bar if frameless drag proves unstable. Needs verification.
> docs\SPEC.md:1098:2. **Hardware presets + VRAM auto-detect (`hardware_preset`)** replace "default `large-v3` fp16 
everywhere". `auto` detects VRAM; `gpu_12gb` is the default for the reference RTX 4070; presets documented in §4.3 and 
the Settings table (§7). (Critical 1)
  docs\SPEC.md:1099:3. **Fallback ladder** with `auto_downgrade_on_backpressure=true` by default, triggered at backlog 
> 2 utt / 3 s (not 8 s), with the full ordered ladder down to audio-only offline catch-up (§4.4). (Critical 2)
> docs\SPEC.md:1105:9. **Hardened summarizer:** transcript treated as untrusted; stdin-only, no `shell=True`, 
delimiters + system instruction, no-tools/read-only sandbox flags, isolated cwd, `CREATE_NO_WINDOW`; residual risk 
documented; Gemini/Ollama noted as safest, Claude CLI kept default (§5.6). (Critical 8)
> docs\SPEC.md:1106:10. **Diarization robustness:** model-specific thresholds, per-assignment confidence, min 
accumulated speech before centroid trust, explicit `"Speaker ?"` for short/low-confidence/overlap and `max_speakers` 
overflow, no centroid updates on low-confidence/short/overlap; `diarization_confidence`/`forced_overflow`/`is_overlap` 
persisted (§5.5, §7). (Important 1, 2, 3)
  docs\SPEC.md:1107:11. **Secrets via OS keychain (`keyring`)**; `GET /api/settings` redacted; write-only secret 
endpoints; owner-only ACL on `settings.json` (§5.10, §5.8, §7). (Important 7)
> docs\SPEC.md:1118:22. **Schema v2:** added `audio_start_sample`, `audio_end_sample`, `source_epoch_id`, 
`source_offset_sec`, `forced_cut`, `diarization_confidence`, `is_overlap`, `forced_overflow`, `speaker_alt`, 
`stale_skipped`, `effective_model`, `effective_compute_type`, `stt_latency_ms`; documented migration from schema 1 
(§5.7, §6). (Minor 4)
  docs\SPEC.md:1119:23. **Placeholders + references fixed:** `channels=…`/`beam_size=…`/`Speaker …` replaced with 
concrete defaults; broken refs (`A11.5`, `A5.7`) normalized to `§N` form (throughout). (Minor 2, 3) The "mojibake" 
finding (Minor 1) was a **false alarm** — the file is valid UTF-8; no re-encoding performed.



 succeeded in 266ms:

  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:15:
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:16:## E2. Summarization scenarios (user emphasis #2) — MUST
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:17:
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:18:`summarizer.summarize()` gains a **`scenario`** parameter. Each scenario is a named, 
config-editable prompt template. Ship these 5; default = **`reformat`**.
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:19:
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:20:1. **`reformat` (DEFAULT) — lossless structuring.** Do **NOT** change, add, remove, translate, 
paraphrase, or reorder the wording of any utterance. ONLY: (a) group related/consecutive utterances into thematic 
sections, (b) add Markdown structure — `##` topic headings, bullet lists, preserved `Speaker + [timestamp]` labels. 
Every original utterance's text must still appear **verbatim** in the output.
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:26:
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:27:- All scenario prompts live in config (`summary_scenarios: {name: prompt}`), user-editable. 
Output always Markdown → `summary.md`; `meta.json` records `summary_scenario` + `summary_provider` + `summarized_at`.
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:28:- Providers unchanged (Claude CLI default, hardened per SPEC §5.6). For `reformat`, the 
deterministic fallback needs no LLM at all.
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:29:
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:30:## E3. Export / download (user emphasis #3) — MUST
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:31:
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:32:Downloadable, **agent-readable** exports of transcript and summary.
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:33:
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:34:- **`.md` (rich, agent-optimized):** YAML front-matter (session_id, title, date, duration, 
sources, languages, model) + a clean body: `## Transcript` with one block per utterance `**[hh:mm:ss] Speaker 
(lang):** text` and translation as a `> ` quote line when present. Consistent, parseable structure so an LLM/agent can 
ingest it directly.
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:35:- **`.txt` (plain):** same information, no Markdown markup, `[hh:mm:ss] Speaker: text` lines; 
translation on the next indented line.
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:36:- Export **transcript** and **summary** independently, and a **combined** transcript+summary 
`.md`.
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:37:- Files served with `Content-Disposition: attachment` and a sensible filename 
(`<session_id>-transcript.md`, etc.).
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:38:
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:48:| `POST` | `/api/capture/start` | `{title?, mode?: "meeting"\|"dictation", sources?: 
["you","them"]}` | `{session_id, sources}` |
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:49:| `POST` | `/api/sessions/{sid}/summarize` | `{scenario?: one of the 5, provider?}` | 
`{markdown, scenario, provider, reformat_fallback?}` + saves `summary.md` |
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:50:| `GET` | `/api/sessions/{sid}/summary` | — | `{markdown, scenario, summarized_at}` or 404 |
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:51:| `GET` | `/api/sessions/{sid}/export` | `?what=transcript\|summary\|combined&fmt=md\|txt` | 
file download (attachment) |
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:52:| `POST` | `/api/sessions/{sid}/rediarize` | — | `{status:"started"}` then progress via WS; 
relabels transcript (SPEC §5.5 tier-2) |
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:53:| `GET` | `/api/sessions/{sid}/rediarize/status` | — | `{state, progress}` |
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:54:| `POST` | `/api/sessions/{sid}/speakers/rename` | `{old, new}` | `{updated_count}` |
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:55:| `GET` | `/api/languages` | — | supported source languages for translation UI |
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:56:
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:57:**WebSocket** (additions to M1): after STT emits an utterance, late results arrive as 
**patch** messages the UI must apply by `seq`:
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:58:```json
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:59:{"type":"patch","seq":123,"translation":"…","translation_provider":"nllb","speaker":"Speaker 
2","diarization_confidence":0.82}
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:60:```
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:61:`translation` and `speaker` may arrive in separate patches. Status/degraded-mode messages 
unchanged.
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:62:
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:63:**Translation settings** (drive M2): `translate_enabled` (bool), `target_lang` (default 
`"vi"`), `source_languages` (list; empty = any non-target). Translate an utterance only when enabled AND `lang != 
target` AND (`source_languages` empty OR `lang ∈ source_languages`) AND lang detection confident enough (SPEC §5.4 
latency/staleness budget applies).
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:64:
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:65:---
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:68:
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:69:- **M2** — `translator.py` (NLLB CT2 int8 on CPU per `gpu_12gb` preset) wired into the 
STT-first pipeline as an async patch; `patch` WS; translate settings + `/api/languages`; UI inline translation + Dịch 
toggle + source-language picker.
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:70:- **M3** — `diarizer.py` tier-1 realtime (Resemblyzer CPU default) with confidence/unknown per 
SPEC §5.5; speaker patch + rename endpoint; UI speaker labels + rename.
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:71:- **M4** — `diarizer.py` tier-2 offline (pyannote) + `/rediarize`; `summarizer.py` with the 5 
scenarios + integrity guard + deterministic reformat fallback; export module + endpoints; delete/retention (SPEC 
§5.7); UI summarize panel (scenario+provider), download buttons, re-diarize button.
  docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:72:
> docs\SPEC-M2-M4.md:73:Each module keeps SPEC's interfaces. Tests must stay green on CPU with no 
GPU/audio/model/HF-token (mock heavy deps; for pyannote/summarizer providers, inject fakes).



codex
Plan:
- Add compact and expanded capture-source controls that map to `mode` and `sources` on `/api/capture/start`, plus a visible `Dịch` toggle wired to `/api/settings`.
- Add expanded summary/export/re-diarize controls and safe Markdown rendering without external libraries.
- Update WebSocket patch normalization, speaker unknown/rename behavior, source-language settings, and rediarize transcript refresh.
- Verify with `node --check ai_record/web/app.js`; no Python/tests/spec edits and no pytest.
codex
I’m editing only the three allowed web files. The HTML patch adds the controls and empty render targets; the JavaScript will own all endpoint wiring and state updates.

+        <label class="tool-field">
+          <span>Scenario</span>
+          <select id="sum-scenario">
+            <option value="reformat">Reformat</option>
+            <option value="minutes">Meeting minutes</option>
+            <option value="study_notes">Study notes</option>
+            <option value="action_tracker">Action tracker</option>
+            <option value="article">Article</option>
+          </select>
+        </label>
+        <label class="tool-field provider-field">
+          <span>Provider</span>
+          <select id="sum-provider">
+            <option value="claude_cli">Claude CLI</option>
+            <option value="codex_cli">Codex CLI</option>
+            <option value="gemini">Gemini</option>
+            <option value="ollama">Ollama</option>
+          </select>
+        </label>
+        <button id="sum-run" class="btn primary" type="button">Run</button>
+
+        <div class="tool-divider" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+
+        <button id="dl-transcript-md" class="btn" type="button">Transcript .md</button>
+        <button id="dl-transcript-txt" class="btn" type="button">Transcript .txt</button>
+        <button id="dl-summary-md" class="btn" type="button">Summary .md</button>
+        <button id="dl-summary-txt" class="btn" type="button">Summary .txt</button>
+        <button id="dl-combined-md" class="btn" type="button">Combined .md</button>
+
+        <div class="tool-divider" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+
+        <button id="rediarize-run" class="btn" type="button">Re-diarize (accurate)</button>
+      </div>
+      <div id="tool-status" class="tool-status" aria-live="polite"></div>
+      <div id="summary-area" class="summary-area" hidden>
+        <div class="summary-head">
+          <span id="summary-meta">Summary</span>
+          <span id="summary-fallback" class="fallback-note" hidden>formatted deterministically to preserve exact wording</span>
+        </div>
+        <div id="summary-output" class="summary-output"></div>
+      </div>
+    </section>
+
     <main class="transcript-wrap">
       <div id="x-transcript" class="transcript" tabindex="0" aria-label="Transcript"></div>
       <button id="x-jump" class="jump-pill" type="button" hidden>Jump to latest ↓</button>

diff --git a/ai_record/web/styles.css b/ai_record/web/styles.css
index 89a1feeb4a3fefac3c7b89254fc87fffaaafcbac..3c81c0514eb3c6224edaad6a5fef71930fb6d721
--- a/ai_record/web/styles.css
+++ b/ai_record/web/styles.css
@@ -120,6 +120,38 @@
 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@
   padding: 14px 16px;
   background: var(--surface);
 }
+.compact-actions {
+  flex: none;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 7px;
+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }

+        <div class="tool-divider" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+
+        <button id="rediarize-run" class="btn" type="button">Re-diarize (accurate)</button>
+      </div>
+      <div id="tool-status" class="tool-status" aria-live="polite"></div>
+      <div id="summary-area" class="summary-area" hidden>
+        <div class="summary-head">
+          <span id="summary-meta">Summary</span>
+          <span id="summary-fallback" class="fallback-note" hidden>formatted deterministically to preserve exact wording</span>
+        </div>
+        <div id="summary-output" class="summary-output"></div>
+      </div>
+    </section>
+
     <main class="transcript-wrap">
       <div id="x-transcript" class="transcript" tabindex="0" aria-label="Transcript"></div>
       <button id="x-jump" class="jump-pill" type="button" hidden>Jump to latest ↓</button>
diff --git a/ai_record/web/styles.css b/ai_record/web/styles.css
index 89a1feeb4a3fefac3c7b89254fc87fffaaafcbac..c3e394e1f4a8b69de8df909527f59d8970362c5b
--- a/ai_record/web/styles.css
+++ b/ai_record/web/styles.css
@@ -120,6 +120,38 @@
 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@
   padding: 14px 16px;
   background: var(--surface);
 }
+.compact-actions {
+  flex: none;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 7px;
+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
@@ -259,6 +303,116 @@
 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {

+            <option value="ollama">Ollama</option>
+          </select>

+        <button id="sum-run" class="btn primary" type="button">Run</button>
+
+        <div class="tool-divider" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+
+        <button id="dl-transcript-md" class="btn" type="button">Transcript .md</button>
+        <button id="dl-transcript-txt" class="btn" type="button">Transcript .txt</button>
+        <button id="dl-summary-md" class="btn" type="button">Summary .md</button>
+        <button id="dl-summary-txt" class="btn" type="button">Summary .txt</button>
+        <button id="dl-combined-md" class="btn" type="button">Combined .md</button>
+
+        <div class="tool-divider" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+
+        <button id="rediarize-run" class="btn" type="button">Re-diarize (accurate)</button>

+      <div id="tool-status" class="tool-status" aria-live="polite"></div>

 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

+            <option value="reformat">Reformat</option>
+            <option value="minutes">Meeting minutes</option>

 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);

+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);

+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;

+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {

+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;

 .title-input:focus { outline: none; background: var(--surface-2); border-color: var(--border-strong); }
@@ -234,10 +278,10 @@
   background: var(--surface);
   padding: 6px 10px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
-  width: 200px;
+  width: 170px;
   transition: border-color .12s, width .15s;
 }
-.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 240px; }
+.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 200px; }
 
 .chips {
   display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
@@ -259,6 +303,116 @@
 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@
   padding: 14px 16px;
   background: var(--surface);
 }
+.compact-actions {
+  flex: none;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 7px;
+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
@@ -207,7 +251,7 @@
 .ex-header {
   display: flex;
   align-items: center;
-  gap: 10px;
+  gap: 8px;
   padding: 10px 14px;
   background: var(--surface);
   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
@@ -223,7 +267,7 @@
   padding: 6px 8px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);

-  max-width: 280px;
+  max-width: 220px;
 }
 .title-input:hover { background: var(--surface-2); }
 .title-input:focus { outline: none; background: var(--surface-2); border-color: var(--border-strong); }
@@ -234,10 +278,10 @@
   background: var(--surface);
   padding: 6px 10px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);

+.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 200px; }
 
 .chips {
   display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
@@ -259,6 +303,116 @@
 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

+        <label class="tool-field">
+          <span>Scenario</span>
+          <select id="sum-scenario">
+            <option value="reformat">Reformat</option>
+            <option value="minutes">Meeting minutes</option>
+            <option value="study_notes">Study notes</option>
+            <option value="action_tracker">Action tracker</option>

+        </label>
+        <label class="tool-field provider-field">

+

+

+        <div id="summary-output" class="summary-output"></div>
+      </div>
+    </section>
+
     <main class="transcript-wrap">
       <div id="x-transcript" class="transcript" tabindex="0" aria-label="Transcript"></div>
       <button id="x-jump" class="jump-pill" type="button" hidden>Jump to latest ↓</button>

Now I’m wiring the JavaScript state and endpoint helpers. This is where the source choice, translation toggle, downloads, summary rendering, and re-diarize polling get connected to the pinned API.

+    { value: "codex_cli", label: "Codex CLI" },

diff --git a/ai_record/web/styles.css b/ai_record/web/styles.css
index 89a1feeb4a3fefac3c7b89254fc87fffaaafcbac..ca7bbe137234edb82cf014f80c94336857cb5faf
--- a/ai_record/web/styles.css
+++ b/ai_record/web/styles.css
@@ -120,6 +120,38 @@
 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@
   padding: 14px 16px;
   background: var(--surface);
 }
+.compact-actions {
+  flex: none;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 7px;
+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
@@ -207,7 +251,7 @@
 .ex-header {
   display: flex;
   align-items: center;
-  gap: 10px;
+  gap: 8px;
   padding: 10px 14px;
   background: var(--surface);
   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
@@ -223,7 +267,7 @@
   padding: 6px 8px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
   min-width: 140px;
-  max-width: 280px;
+  max-width: 220px;
 }
 .title-input:hover { background: var(--surface-2); }
 .title-input:focus { outline: none; background: var(--surface-2); border-color: var(--border-strong); }
@@ -234,10 +278,10 @@
   background: var(--surface);
   padding: 6px 10px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
-  width: 200px;
+  width: 170px;
   transition: border-color .12s, width .15s;
 }
-.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 240px; }
+.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 200px; }
 
 .chips {
   display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
@@ -259,6 +303,116 @@
 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

diff --git a/ai_record/web/app.js b/ai_record/web/app.js
index c38524eb7e23024d1fc5ccaf344f63320ab58340..b59fe030b6f652dbe3634acb04b404516e42694f
--- a/ai_record/web/app.js

     wsBackoff: 500,
     wsTimer: null,
     everConnected: false,
+    captureChoice: "both",
+    languages: [],
+    rediarizeTimer: null,
+    currentSummary: null,
   };
 
   const MAX_ROWS = 500;      // cap DOM nodes for very long transcripts
+  const UNKNOWN_SPEAKER = "Speaker ?";
+  const CAPTURE_CHOICES = {
+    both:   { mode: "meeting",   sources: ["you", "them"] },
+    mic:    { mode: "dictation", sources: ["you"] },
+    system: { mode: "meeting",   sources: ["them"] },
+  };
+  const SUMMARY_PROVIDERS = [
+    { value: "claude_cli", label: "Claude CLI" },
+    { value: "codex_cli", label: "Codex CLI" },
+    { value: "gemini", label: "Gemini" },
+    { value: "ollama", label: "Ollama" },
+  ];
 
   /* ============================ DOM SHORTCUTS ============================ */
   const $ = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
@@ -41,11 +57,20 @@

     xChips: $("x-chips"), xSearch: $("x-search"), xSettings: $("x-settings"),

+    sumScenario: $("sum-scenario"), sumProvider: $("sum-provider"), sumRun: $("sum-run"),
+    dlTranscriptMd: $("dl-transcript-md"), dlTranscriptTxt: $("dl-transcript-txt"),
+    dlSummaryMd: $("dl-summary-md"), dlSummaryTxt: $("dl-summary-txt"),
+    dlCombinedMd: $("dl-combined-md"), rediarizeRun: $("rediarize-run"),
+    toolStatus: $("tool-status"), summaryArea: $("summary-area"),
+    summaryMeta: $("summary-meta"), summaryFallback: $("summary-fallback"),
+    summaryOutput: $("summary-output"),
     // overlays

-.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 240px; }
+.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 200px; }
 
 .chips {
   display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
@@ -259,6 +303,116 @@
 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

+  };
+  const SUMMARY_PROVIDERS = [

+    summaryMeta: $("summary-meta"), summaryFallback: $("summary-fallback"),
+    summaryOutput: $("summary-output"),

@@ -76,6 +101,37 @@
     return ct.includes("application/json") ? res.json() : res.text();
   }
 
+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+
   /* ============================ NOTICES ============================ */
   function notice(message, kind = "info") {
     const node = document.createElement("div");

+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+

diff --git a/ai_record/web/styles.css b/ai_record/web/styles.css
index 89a1feeb4a3fefac3c7b89254fc87fffaaafcbac..ca7bbe137234edb82cf014f80c94336857cb5faf
--- a/ai_record/web/styles.css

@@ -120,6 +120,38 @@
 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;

+}

 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

codex
I’m wiring the start-source controls now. The selected source maps to `{mode, sources}` exactly at capture start and is locked while a session is running.
2026-07-05T04:40:36.007137Z ERROR codex_core::tools::router: error=apply_patch verification failed: Failed to find expected lines in C:\Users\DucNguyen\Code\ai-record\ai_record\web\app.js:
  function setRecording(on) {
    state.recording = on;
    for (const btn of [el.cToggle, el.xToggle]) {
      btn.classList.toggle("recording", on);
      btn.textContent = on ? "â— Stop" : "Start";
    }
  }

  function refreshToggleEnabled() {
    const enabled = state.consentOk;
    for (const btn of [el.cToggle, el.xToggle]) {
      btn.disabled = !enabled;
      btn.title = enabled ? "" : "Acknowledge the consent notice before recording.";
    }
  }

index 89a1feeb4a3fefac3c7b89254fc87fffaaafcbac..ca7bbe137234edb82cf014f80c94336857cb5faf
--- a/ai_record/web/styles.css

 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@
   padding: 14px 16px;
   background: var(--surface);
 }
+.compact-actions {
+  flex: none;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 7px;
+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
@@ -207,7 +251,7 @@
 .ex-header {
   display: flex;
   align-items: center;
-  gap: 10px;
+  gap: 8px;
   padding: 10px 14px;
   background: var(--surface);
   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
@@ -223,7 +267,7 @@

   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
   min-width: 140px;
-  max-width: 280px;

 }
 .title-input:hover { background: var(--surface-2); }

@@ -234,10 +278,10 @@
   background: var(--surface);

 .chips {
   display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
@@ -259,6 +303,116 @@
 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

@@ -76,6 +101,37 @@
     return ct.includes("application/json") ? res.json() : res.text();
   }
 
+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+
   /* ============================ NOTICES ============================ */
   function notice(message, kind = "info") {
     const node = document.createElement("div");
@@ -192,6 +248,7 @@

       btn.textContent = on ? "● Stop" : "Start";
     }
+    for (const sel of [el.cSource, el.xSource]) sel.disabled = on;
   }
 
   function refreshToggleEnabled() {

+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

+    dlSummaryMd: $("dl-summary-md"), dlSummaryTxt: $("dl-summary-txt"),
+    dlCombinedMd: $("dl-combined-md"), rediarizeRun: $("rediarize-run"),
+    toolStatus: $("tool-status"), summaryArea: $("summary-area"),
+    summaryMeta: $("summary-meta"), summaryFallback: $("summary-fallback"),

@@ -76,6 +101,37 @@
     return ct.includes("application/json") ? res.json() : res.text();
   }
 
+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+
   /* ============================ NOTICES ============================ */
   function notice(message, kind = "info") {
     const node = document.createElement("div");
@@ -192,6 +248,7 @@
       btn.classList.toggle("recording", on);
       btn.textContent = on ? "● Stop" : "Start";
     }
+    for (const sel of [el.cSource, el.xSource]) sel.disabled = on;
   }
 
   function refreshToggleEnabled() {

+    sumScenario: $("sum-scenario"), sumProvider: $("sum-provider"), sumRun: $("sum-run"),
+    dlTranscriptMd: $("dl-transcript-md"), dlTranscriptTxt: $("dl-transcript-txt"),

@@ -76,6 +101,37 @@
     return ct.includes("application/json") ? res.json() : res.text();
   }
 
+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+

   function notice(message, kind = "info") {

     }

+  function setCaptureChoice(choice) {
+    state.captureChoice = CAPTURE_CHOICES[choice] ? choice : "both";
+    for (const sel of [el.cSource, el.xSource]) {
+      if (sel.value !== state.captureChoice) sel.value = state.captureChoice;
+    }
+  }
+
+  function captureRequest() {
+    const selected = CAPTURE_CHOICES[state.captureChoice] || CAPTURE_CHOICES.both;
+    return { mode: selected.mode, sources: selected.sources.slice() };
+  }
+
+  function bindCaptureSource(sel) {
+    sel.addEventListener("change", () => setCaptureChoice(sel.value));
+  }
+  bindCaptureSource(el.cSource);
+  bindCaptureSource(el.xSource);
+
+  function updateTranslateButtons() {
+    const on = !!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled);
+    for (const btn of [el.cTranslate, el.xTranslate]) {
+      btn.setAttribute("aria-pressed", on ? "true" : "false");
+      btn.title = on ? "Translation is on" : "Translation is off";
+    }
+  }
+
+  function refreshTranslationRows() {
+    for (const { record, el: row } of state.utterances.values()) {
+      const tr = row.querySelector(".tr");
+      if (tr) applyTranslation(tr, record);
+    }
+    renderRecent();
+  }
+
+  async function setTranslateEnabled(enabled) {
+    try {
+      const updated = await api("/api/settings", { method: "PUT", body: { translate_enabled: enabled } });
+      state.settings = updated || Object.assign(state.settings || {}, { translate_enabled: enabled });
+      updateTranslateButtons();
+      refreshTranslationRows();
+    } catch (e) {
+      notice("Couldn't update translation: " + (e.message || e), "error");
+    }
+  }
+  el.cTranslate.addEventListener("click", () => setTranslateEnabled(!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled)));
+  el.xTranslate.addEventListener("click", () => setTranslateEnabled(!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled)));
+
