diff --git a/ai_record/web/styles.css b/ai_record/web/styles.css
index 89a1feeb4a3fefac3c7b89254fc87fffaaafcbac..ca7bbe137234edb82cf014f80c94336857cb5faf
--- a/ai_record/web/styles.css
+++ b/ai_record/web/styles.css
@@ -120,6 +120,38 @@
 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@
   padding: 14px 16px;
   background: var(--surface);
 }
+.compact-actions {
+  flex: none;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 7px;
+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
@@ -207,7 +251,7 @@
 .ex-header {
   display: flex;
   align-items: center;
-  gap: 10px;
+  gap: 8px;
   padding: 10px 14px;
   background: var(--surface);
   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
@@ -223,7 +267,7 @@
   padding: 6px 8px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
   min-width: 140px;
-  max-width: 280px;
+  max-width: 220px;
 }
 .title-input:hover { background: var(--surface-2); }
 .title-input:focus { outline: none; background: var(--surface-2); border-color: var(--border-strong); }
@@ -234,10 +278,10 @@
   background: var(--surface);
   padding: 6px 10px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
-  width: 200px;
+  width: 170px;
   transition: border-color .12s, width .15s;
 }
-.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 240px; }
+.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 200px; }
 
 .chips {
   display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
@@ -259,6 +303,116 @@
 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;

+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

    input.value = current;
    input.placeholder = "Speaker name";

+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+

 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }

+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);

+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@

+  flex: none;

+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 7px;
+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }

 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

@@ -76,6 +101,37 @@
     return ct.includes("application/json") ? res.json() : res.text();
   }
 
+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+
   /* ============================ NOTICES ============================ */
   function notice(message, kind = "info") {
     const node = document.createElement("div");
@@ -192,6 +248,7 @@
       btn.classList.toggle("recording", on);

     }

   }
 
   function refreshToggleEnabled() {
@@ -202,15 +259,64 @@
     }
   }
 
+  function setCaptureChoice(choice) {
+    state.captureChoice = CAPTURE_CHOICES[choice] ? choice : "both";
+    for (const sel of [el.cSource, el.xSource]) {
+      if (sel.value !== state.captureChoice) sel.value = state.captureChoice;
+    }
+  }
+
+  function captureRequest() {
+    const selected = CAPTURE_CHOICES[state.captureChoice] || CAPTURE_CHOICES.both;
+    return { mode: selected.mode, sources: selected.sources.slice() };
+  }
+
+  function bindCaptureSource(sel) {
+    sel.addEventListener("change", () => setCaptureChoice(sel.value));
+  }
+  bindCaptureSource(el.cSource);
+  bindCaptureSource(el.xSource);
+
+  function updateTranslateButtons() {
+    const on = !!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled);
+    for (const btn of [el.cTranslate, el.xTranslate]) {
+      btn.setAttribute("aria-pressed", on ? "true" : "false");
+      btn.title = on ? "Translation is on" : "Translation is off";
+    }
+  }
+
+  function refreshTranslationRows() {
+    for (const { record, el: row } of state.utterances.values()) {
+      const tr = row.querySelector(".tr");
+      if (tr) applyTranslation(tr, record);
+    }
+    renderRecent();
+  }
+
+  async function setTranslateEnabled(enabled) {
+    try {
+      const updated = await api("/api/settings", { method: "PUT", body: { translate_enabled: enabled } });
+      state.settings = updated || Object.assign(state.settings || {}, { translate_enabled: enabled });
+      updateTranslateButtons();
+      refreshTranslationRows();
+    } catch (e) {
+      notice("Couldn't update translation: " + (e.message || e), "error");
+    }
+  }
+  el.cTranslate.addEventListener("click", () => setTranslateEnabled(!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled)));
+  el.xTranslate.addEventListener("click", () => setTranslateEnabled(!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled)));
+
   /* ============================ TRANSCRIPT RENDERING ============================ */
   function speakerText(rec) {
-    // Unknown / low-confidence -> "?"
+    // Unknown / low-confidence -> "Speaker ?"
     if (rec.speaker && rec.speaker.trim()) {
       const low = rec.diarization_confidence != null && rec.diarization_confidence < 0.5;
-      return { text: rec.speaker, cls: low ? "unknown" : "" };
+      const label = rec.speaker.trim();
+      const unknown = low || label === "?" || label === UNKNOWN_SPEAKER;
+      return { text: label === "?" ? UNKNOWN_SPEAKER : label, cls: unknown ? "unknown" : "" };
     }
     // No speaker yet: diarization pending placeholder.
-    return { text: "?", cls: "pending" };
+    return { text: UNKNOWN_SPEAKER, cls: "pending unknown" };
   }

+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;

+.compact-actions {
+  flex: none;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 7px;
+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
@@ -207,7 +251,7 @@
 .ex-header {
   display: flex;
   align-items: center;
-  gap: 10px;
+  gap: 8px;
   padding: 10px 14px;
   background: var(--surface);
   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);

   padding: 6px 8px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
   min-width: 140px;
-  max-width: 280px;

 }
 .title-input:hover { background: var(--surface-2); }
 .title-input:focus { outline: none; background: var(--surface-2); border-color: var(--border-strong); }
@@ -234,10 +278,10 @@
   background: var(--surface);
   padding: 6px 10px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
-  width: 200px;
+  width: 170px;
   transition: border-color .12s, width .15s;
 }
-.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 240px; }
+.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 200px; }
 
 .chips {
   display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
@@ -259,6 +303,116 @@
 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

+    mic:    { mode: "dictation", sources: ["you"] },
+    system: { mode: "meeting",   sources: ["them"] },

+  const SUMMARY_PROVIDERS = [
+    { value: "claude_cli", label: "Claude CLI" },
+    { value: "codex_cli", label: "Codex CLI" },
+    { value: "gemini", label: "Gemini" },
+    { value: "ollama", label: "Ollama" },
+  ];
 
   /* ============================ DOM SHORTCUTS ============================ */
   const $ = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
@@ -41,11 +57,20 @@
     // compact
     cToggle: $("c-toggle"), cDot: $("c-dot"), cStatusText: $("c-status-text"),

     xChips: $("x-chips"), xSearch: $("x-search"), xSettings: $("x-settings"),

+    dlCombinedMd: $("dl-combined-md"), rediarizeRun: $("rediarize-run"),
+    toolStatus: $("tool-status"), summaryArea: $("summary-area"),

+    summaryOutput: $("summary-output"),
     // overlays

     preflight: $("preflight"), pfRows: $("pf-rows"), pfPreset: $("pf-preset"),
@@ -76,6 +101,37 @@
     return ct.includes("application/json") ? res.json() : res.text();
   }
 
+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+
   /* ============================ NOTICES ============================ */
   function notice(message, kind = "info") {
     const node = document.createElement("div");
@@ -192,6 +248,7 @@
       btn.classList.toggle("recording", on);
       btn.textContent = on ? "● Stop" : "Start";
     }
+    for (const sel of [el.cSource, el.xSource]) sel.disabled = on;
   }
 
   function refreshToggleEnabled() {
@@ -202,15 +259,64 @@
     }
   }
 
+  function setCaptureChoice(choice) {
+    state.captureChoice = CAPTURE_CHOICES[choice] ? choice : "both";
+    for (const sel of [el.cSource, el.xSource]) {
+      if (sel.value !== state.captureChoice) sel.value = state.captureChoice;
+    }
+  }
+
+  function captureRequest() {
+    const selected = CAPTURE_CHOICES[state.captureChoice] || CAPTURE_CHOICES.both;
+    return { mode: selected.mode, sources: selected.sources.slice() };
+  }
+
+  function bindCaptureSource(sel) {
+    sel.addEventListener("change", () => setCaptureChoice(sel.value));
+  }
+  bindCaptureSource(el.cSource);
+  bindCaptureSource(el.xSource);
+
+  function updateTranslateButtons() {
+    const on = !!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled);
+    for (const btn of [el.cTranslate, el.xTranslate]) {
+      btn.setAttribute("aria-pressed", on ? "true" : "false");
+      btn.title = on ? "Translation is on" : "Translation is off";
+    }
+  }
+
+  function refreshTranslationRows() {
+    for (const { record, el: row } of state.utterances.values()) {
+      const tr = row.querySelector(".tr");
+      if (tr) applyTranslation(tr, record);
+    }
+    renderRecent();
+  }
+
+  async function setTranslateEnabled(enabled) {
+    try {
+      const updated = await api("/api/settings", { method: "PUT", body: { translate_enabled: enabled } });
+      state.settings = updated || Object.assign(state.settings || {}, { translate_enabled: enabled });
+      updateTranslateButtons();
+      refreshTranslationRows();
+    } catch (e) {
+      notice("Couldn't update translation: " + (e.message || e), "error");
+    }
+  }
+  el.cTranslate.addEventListener("click", () => setTranslateEnabled(!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled)));
+  el.xTranslate.addEventListener("click", () => setTranslateEnabled(!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled)));
+
   /* ============================ TRANSCRIPT RENDERING ============================ */
   function speakerText(rec) {
-    // Unknown / low-confidence -> "?"
+    // Unknown / low-confidence -> "Speaker ?"
     if (rec.speaker && rec.speaker.trim()) {
       const low = rec.diarization_confidence != null && rec.diarization_confidence < 0.5;
-      return { text: rec.speaker, cls: low ? "unknown" : "" };
+      const label = rec.speaker.trim();
+      const unknown = low || label === "?" || label === UNKNOWN_SPEAKER;
+      return { text: label === "?" ? UNKNOWN_SPEAKER : label, cls: unknown ? "unknown" : "" };
     }
     // No speaker yet: diarization pending placeholder.
-    return { text: "?", cls: "pending" };
+    return { text: UNKNOWN_SPEAKER, cls: "pending unknown" };
   }
 
   function buildRow(rec) {

+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+
   /* ============================ NOTICES ============================ */
   function notice(message, kind = "info") {
     const node = document.createElement("div");

@@ -202,15 +259,64 @@

+  function setCaptureChoice(choice) {
+    state.captureChoice = CAPTURE_CHOICES[choice] ? choice : "both";
+    for (const sel of [el.cSource, el.xSource]) {
+      if (sel.value !== state.captureChoice) sel.value = state.captureChoice;
+    }
+  }
+
+  function captureRequest() {
+    const selected = CAPTURE_CHOICES[state.captureChoice] || CAPTURE_CHOICES.both;
+    return { mode: selected.mode, sources: selected.sources.slice() };
+  }
+
+  function bindCaptureSource(sel) {
+    sel.addEventListener("change", () => setCaptureChoice(sel.value));
+  }
+  bindCaptureSource(el.cSource);
+  bindCaptureSource(el.xSource);
+
+  function updateTranslateButtons() {
+    const on = !!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled);
+    for (const btn of [el.cTranslate, el.xTranslate]) {
+      btn.setAttribute("aria-pressed", on ? "true" : "false");
+      btn.title = on ? "Translation is on" : "Translation is off";
+    }
+  }
+
+  function refreshTranslationRows() {
+    for (const { record, el: row } of state.utterances.values()) {
+      const tr = row.querySelector(".tr");
+      if (tr) applyTranslation(tr, record);
+    }
+    renderRecent();
+  }
+
+  async function setTranslateEnabled(enabled) {
+    try {
+      const updated = await api("/api/settings", { method: "PUT", body: { translate_enabled: enabled } });
+      state.settings = updated || Object.assign(state.settings || {}, { translate_enabled: enabled });
+      updateTranslateButtons();
+      refreshTranslationRows();
+    } catch (e) {
+      notice("Couldn't update translation: " + (e.message || e), "error");
+    }
+  }
+  el.cTranslate.addEventListener("click", () => setTranslateEnabled(!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled)));

+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;

+  font-weight: 650;

+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {

+  font-size: 12.5px;

+}
+.fallback-note {

+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {

+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;

+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }

+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

     return ct.includes("application/json") ? res.json() : res.text();

+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+
   /* ============================ NOTICES ============================ */
   function notice(message, kind = "info") {
     const node = document.createElement("div");
@@ -192,6 +248,7 @@

@@ -202,15 +259,64 @@
     }
   }
 
+  function setCaptureChoice(choice) {
+    state.captureChoice = CAPTURE_CHOICES[choice] ? choice : "both";
+    for (const sel of [el.cSource, el.xSource]) {
+      if (sel.value !== state.captureChoice) sel.value = state.captureChoice;
+    }
+  }
+
+  function captureRequest() {
+    const selected = CAPTURE_CHOICES[state.captureChoice] || CAPTURE_CHOICES.both;
+    return { mode: selected.mode, sources: selected.sources.slice() };
+  }
+
+  function bindCaptureSource(sel) {
+    sel.addEventListener("change", () => setCaptureChoice(sel.value));
+  }
+  bindCaptureSource(el.cSource);
+  bindCaptureSource(el.xSource);
+
+  function updateTranslateButtons() {
+    const on = !!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled);
+    for (const btn of [el.cTranslate, el.xTranslate]) {
+      btn.setAttribute("aria-pressed", on ? "true" : "false");
+      btn.title = on ? "Translation is on" : "Translation is off";
+    }
+  }
+
+  function refreshTranslationRows() {
+    for (const { record, el: row } of state.utterances.values()) {
+      const tr = row.querySelector(".tr");
+      if (tr) applyTranslation(tr, record);
+    }
+    renderRecent();
+  }
+
+  async function setTranslateEnabled(enabled) {
+    try {
+      const updated = await api("/api/settings", { method: "PUT", body: { translate_enabled: enabled } });
+      state.settings = updated || Object.assign(state.settings || {}, { translate_enabled: enabled });
+      updateTranslateButtons();
+      refreshTranslationRows();
+    } catch (e) {
+      notice("Couldn't update translation: " + (e.message || e), "error");

     }

diff --git a/ai_record/web/styles.css b/ai_record/web/styles.css
index 89a1feeb4a3fefac3c7b89254fc87fffaaafcbac..ca7bbe137234edb82cf014f80c94336857cb5faf
--- a/ai_record/web/styles.css
+++ b/ai_record/web/styles.css
@@ -120,6 +120,38 @@
 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@
   padding: 14px 16px;
   background: var(--surface);
 }
+.compact-actions {
+  flex: none;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 7px;
+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
@@ -207,7 +251,7 @@
 .ex-header {
   display: flex;
   align-items: center;
-  gap: 10px;
+  gap: 8px;
   padding: 10px 14px;
   background: var(--surface);
   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
@@ -223,7 +267,7 @@
   padding: 6px 8px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
   min-width: 140px;
-  max-width: 280px;
+  max-width: 220px;
 }
 .title-input:hover { background: var(--surface-2); }
 .title-input:focus { outline: none; background: var(--surface-2); border-color: var(--border-strong); }
@@ -234,10 +278,10 @@
   background: var(--surface);
   padding: 6px 10px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);

 }
-.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 240px; }
+.search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); width: 200px; }
 
 .chips {
   display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
@@ -259,6 +303,116 @@
 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

     return ct.includes("application/json") ? res.json() : res.text();

+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+

+      if (sel.value !== state.captureChoice) sel.value = state.captureChoice;
+    }
+  }
+
+  function captureRequest() {
+    const selected = CAPTURE_CHOICES[state.captureChoice] || CAPTURE_CHOICES.both;
+    return { mode: selected.mode, sources: selected.sources.slice() };
+  }
+
+  function bindCaptureSource(sel) {
+    sel.addEventListener("change", () => setCaptureChoice(sel.value));
+  }
+  bindCaptureSource(el.cSource);
+  bindCaptureSource(el.xSource);
+
+  function updateTranslateButtons() {
+    const on = !!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled);
+    for (const btn of [el.cTranslate, el.xTranslate]) {
+      btn.setAttribute("aria-pressed", on ? "true" : "false");
+      btn.title = on ? "Translation is on" : "Translation is off";
+    }
+  }
+
+  function refreshTranslationRows() {
+    for (const { record, el: row } of state.utterances.values()) {
+      const tr = row.querySelector(".tr");
+      if (tr) applyTranslation(tr, record);
+    }
+    renderRecent();
+  }
+
+  async function setTranslateEnabled(enabled) {
+    try {
+      const updated = await api("/api/settings", { method: "PUT", body: { translate_enabled: enabled } });

+  el.cTranslate.addEventListener("click", () => setTranslateEnabled(!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled)));
+  el.xTranslate.addEventListener("click", () => setTranslateEnabled(!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled)));

diff --git a/ai_record/web/styles.css b/ai_record/web/styles.css
index 89a1feeb4a3fefac3c7b89254fc87fffaaafcbac..ca7bbe137234edb82cf014f80c94336857cb5faf
--- a/ai_record/web/styles.css
+++ b/ai_record/web/styles.css
@@ -120,6 +120,38 @@
 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@
   padding: 14px 16px;
   background: var(--surface);
 }
+.compact-actions {
+  flex: none;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 7px;
+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
@@ -207,7 +251,7 @@
 .ex-header {
   display: flex;
   align-items: center;
-  gap: 10px;
+  gap: 8px;
   padding: 10px 14px;
   background: var(--surface);
   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
@@ -223,7 +267,7 @@
   padding: 6px 8px;
   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
   min-width: 140px;
-  max-width: 280px;
+  max-width: 220px;
 }
 .title-input:hover { background: var(--surface-2); }
 .title-input:focus { outline: none; background: var(--surface-2); border-color: var(--border-strong); }
@@ -234,10 +278,10 @@
   background: var(--surface);

 }

   display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
@@ -259,6 +303,116 @@
 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }

+      if (sel.value !== state.captureChoice) sel.value = state.captureChoice;
+    }
+  }
+
+  function captureRequest() {
+    const selected = CAPTURE_CHOICES[state.captureChoice] || CAPTURE_CHOICES.both;
+    return { mode: selected.mode, sources: selected.sources.slice() };
+  }
+
+  function bindCaptureSource(sel) {
+    sel.addEventListener("change", () => setCaptureChoice(sel.value));

+  bindCaptureSource(el.cSource);
+  bindCaptureSource(el.xSource);
+
+  function updateTranslateButtons() {
+    const on = !!(state.settings && state.settings.translate_enabled);
+    for (const btn of [el.cTranslate, el.xTranslate]) {
+      btn.setAttribute("aria-pressed", on ? "true" : "false");
+      btn.title = on ? "Translation is on" : "Translation is off";
+    }
+  }
+
+  function refreshTranslationRows() {
+    for (const { record, el: row } of state.utterances.values()) {
+      const tr = row.querySelector(".tr");

+    }
+    renderRecent();
+  }
+
+  async function setTranslateEnabled(enabled) {
+    try {

 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@
   padding: 14px 16px;
   background: var(--surface);
 }

+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }

   display: flex;

+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

diff --git a/ai_record/web/styles.css b/ai_record/web/styles.css
index 89a1feeb4a3fefac3c7b89254fc87fffaaafcbac..ca7bbe137234edb82cf014f80c94336857cb5faf
--- a/ai_record/web/styles.css

@@ -120,6 +120,38 @@
 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@
   padding: 14px 16px;
   background: var(--surface);
 }
+.compact-actions {
+  flex: none;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 7px;
+}
+.compact-source {
+  width: 142px;
+  min-width: 0;
+  height: 28px;
+}
+.compact-translate { flex: none; }
 .compact-body { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; }
 
 .status-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
@@ -207,7 +251,7 @@

   display: flex;
   align-items: center;
-  gap: 10px;

   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);

   min-width: 140px;
-  max-width: 280px;

 }

@@ -234,10 +278,10 @@
   background: var(--surface);

 }

   display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
@@ -259,6 +303,116 @@
 .chip.warn { color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warn) 35%, var(--border)); }
 .chip.info { color: var(--accent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 35%, var(--border)); background: var(--accent-weak); }
 
+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

@@ -76,6 +101,37 @@
     return ct.includes("application/json") ? res.json() : res.text();
   }
 
+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+
   /* ============================ NOTICES ============================ */
   function notice(message, kind = "info") {
     const node = document.createElement("div");

@@ -202,15 +259,64 @@
     }

+    }
+  }
+

+    const selected = CAPTURE_CHOICES[state.captureChoice] || CAPTURE_CHOICES.both;
+    return { mode: selected.mode, sources: selected.sources.slice() };
+  }
+
+  function bindCaptureSource(sel) {

 .btn.danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); }
 .btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
 
+.toggle-btn {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 11px;
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  transition: background .12s ease, border-color .12s ease, color .12s ease;
+}
+.toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.toggle-btn[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.toggle-btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }
+
+.source-select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  min-width: 132px;
+}
+.source-select:disabled { opacity: .55; }
+
 .icon-btn {
   border: 1px solid transparent;
   background: transparent;
@@ -166,6 +198,18 @@

+/* Session tools */
+.tools-panel {
+  flex: none;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  padding: 9px 14px 10px;
+}
+.tools-row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: end;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+.tool-field {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+  min-width: 144px;
+}
+.tool-field span {
+  font-size: 10.5px;
+  line-height: 1;
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  letter-spacing: .06em;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+.tool-field select {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 8px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.provider-field { min-width: 128px; }
+.tools-row .btn {
+  height: 32px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-divider {
+  width: 1px;
+  height: 24px;
+  background: var(--border);
+  margin: 0 2px;
+}
+.tool-status {
+  min-height: 18px;
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+}
+.tool-status:empty { display: none; }
+.summary-area {
+  margin-top: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--bg);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+.summary-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 7px 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  font-size: 12.5px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+.fallback-note {
+  color: var(--warn);
+  font-weight: 500;
+}
+.summary-output {
+  max-height: 180px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+.summary-output h1,
+.summary-output h2,
+.summary-output h3 {
+  margin: 11px 0 6px;
+  line-height: 1.25;
+}
+.summary-output h1 { font-size: 17px; }
+.summary-output h2 { font-size: 15px; }
+.summary-output h3 { font-size: 14px; }
+.summary-output p { margin: 0 0 8px; }
+.summary-output ul,
+.summary-output ol { margin: 0 0 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
+.summary-output li { margin: 3px 0; }
+.summary-output code {
+  font-family: var(--font-mono);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  background: var(--surface-2);
+  border-radius: 4px;
+  padding: 1px 4px;
+}
+.summary-output blockquote {
+  margin: 0 0 8px;
+  padding-left: 10px;
+  border-left: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+}
+
 /* Transcript */
 .transcript-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0; }
 .transcript {
@@ -442,6 +596,34 @@
 .set-row .val { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12.5px; }
 .set-row.readonly .val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
 
+.lang-picker {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 6px;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  max-width: 230px;
+}
+.lang-chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text-muted);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  padding: 4px 9px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.2;
+}
+.lang-chip:hover { background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); }
+.lang-chip[aria-pressed="true"] {
+  background: var(--accent-weak);
+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--border));
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.lang-empty {
+  color: var(--text-faint);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
 .secret-state { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
 .secret-state.set { color: var(--ok); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ok) 14%, transparent); }
 .secret-state.unset { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface-2); }

+  async function downloadAttachment(path, fallbackName) {
+    const res = await fetch(path, { headers: { [HEADER]: TOKEN || "" } });
+    if (!res.ok) {
+      const err = new Error(`GET ${path} -> ${res.status}`);
+      err.status = res.status;
+      try { err.data = await res.json(); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
+      throw err;
+    }
+    const blob = await res.blob();
+    const filename = filenameFromDisposition(res.headers.get("content-disposition")) || fallbackName;
+    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
+    const a = document.createElement("a");
+    a.href = url;
+    a.download = filename;
+    document.body.appendChild(a);
+    a.click();
+    a.remove();
+    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
+  }
+
+  function filenameFromDisposition(disposition) {
+    if (!disposition) return "";
+    const utf = disposition.match(/filename\*=UTF-8''([^;]+)/i);
+    if (utf) {
+      try { return decodeURIComponent(utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "")); }
+      catch (_) { return utf[1].trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ""); }
+    }
+    const plain = disposition.match(/filename="?([^";]+)"?/i);
+    return plain ? plain[1].trim() : "";
+  }
+
